goal: Produce Phase-1 planning spec for Story button redesign by reverse engineering the existing three menu buttons and defining a strict redraw blueprint.
constraints: This phase is planning only: no asset redraw and no code integration.
Document layer model, geometry, typography, icon semantics, and acceptance gates.
Mark unknown source facts as UNKNOWN and register them in open_questions.md.
deliverables: A phase-1 planning document for Story button redesign.
A reproducible design blueprint based on existing button system.
Open-questions update for unresolved source-layer information.
